moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico, is in full swing, having kicked off on June 11 and running until July 19.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: Another day, another set of World Cup clashes! Who are you backing to make it through to the next round?

angles.name: Fan Reactions
angles.copy: The World Cup drama continues! What's been your standout moment from the tournament so far? The goals, the upsets, the passion!

moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the world's most prestigious tennis tournament, begins on Monday, June 29, 2026, bringing two weeks of grass-court action to London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries & cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first aces on Monday. Who's your pick for the trophy this year?

angles.name: Tradition
angles.copy: That iconic green grass and all-white attire. Wimbledon is almost here, bringing its unique blend of tradition and world-class tennis.

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Series 13, which started on June 1, 2026, continues to air nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with the islanders navigating new couplings and villa drama.

angles.name: Tonight's Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's cracking on, and whose head is about to turn? Tune in tonight!

angles.name: Fan Theories
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is buzzing! What are your theories on who's genuine and who's playing games? Drop them below!

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Festival Live
moments.blurb: The BST Hyde Park summer music festival is currently underway in London, featuring global headline artists and running until July 12.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: BST Hyde Park is LIVE in London! Who's soaking up the festival vibes and catching some incredible acts this weekend?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The sound of summer is in Hyde Park! BST brings a packed line-up to the capital. What's your favourite festival memory?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is out today, revealing the nation's biggest tracks and new entries.

angles.name: New No.1?
angles.copy: Has your favourite track climbed to the top? The new Official UK Singles Chart is here! Who's your money on for number one?

angles.name: Chart rundown
angles.copy: Weekend playlist sorted! The latest UK Singles Chart is live. What new tunes are you adding to your rotation?

moments.title: Cheryl Turns 43
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cheryl, known for her work with Girls Aloud and a successful solo career, celebrates her 43rd birthday on June 30.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Cheryl who turns 43 on June 30! What's your favourite Girls Aloud or solo track?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: From Girls Aloud to solo superstar, Cheryl has given us so many pop anthems. Happy 43rd birthday to a true UK music icon!

moments.title: Debbie Harry Turns 81
moments.blurb: The legendary Blondie frontwoman, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Iconic Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 81st birthday to the iconic Debbie Harry! Blondie wouldn't be the same without her incredible voice and style. What's your favourite Blondie hit?

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Still looking amazing and sounding even better! Celebrating the incredible Debbie Harry as she turns 81 on July 1.

moments.title: Missy Elliott Turns 55
moments.blurb: Trailblazing rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On for Missy Elliott's 55th birthday on July 1! A true innovator and legend in music.

angles.name: Birthday Beats
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the incredible Missy Elliott! Her influence on music is undeniable. What's your favourite Missy track?

moments.title: Burna Boy Turns 35
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning Nigerian superstar Burna Boy, known for his Afrobeats and dancehall hits, celebrates his 35th birthday on July 2.

angles.name: Afrobeats King
angles.copy: Big birthday shoutout to the African Giant, Burna Boy, who turns 35 on July 2! What's your go-to Burna Boy anthem?

angles.name: Celebration Vibes
angles.copy: The vibes are high for Burna Boy's 35th! Wishing him a fantastic birthday filled with good music and celebration.

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: The charismatic frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, Huey Lewis, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Do you believe in the Power of Love? Happy 76th birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis on July 5!

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating an 80s icon! Huey Lewis turns 76 this week. What's your favourite Huey Lewis & The News track?

moments.title: Shane Filan Turns 47
moments.blurb: Westlife's beloved singer, Shane Filan, celebrates his 47th birthday on July 5.

angles.name: Boyband Legend
angles.copy: Flying Without Wings into his 47th birthday! Happy Birthday to Westlife's Shane Filan on July 5!

angles.name: Westlife Memories
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 47th Birthday to Shane Filan! What's your favourite Westlife song to sing along to?

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Happy 51st to the one and only 50 Cent on July 6!

angles.name: Hip Hop Mogul
angles.copy: Celebrating a hip hop legend! 50 Cent turns 51 this week. What's your favourite track from his incredible career?

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr on July 7!

angles.name: Drummer Icon
angles.copy: From Abbey Road to solo success, Ringo Starr is a true music legend. Happy 86th Birthday to The Beatles' drummer!

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: The summer school holidays officially begin for some parts of the UK, including Northern Ireland, on July 1, with other regions following later in the month.

angles.name: Holiday Mode On
angles.copy: School's out for summer! For many, the long-awaited summer holidays begin this week. What are your plans?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The great escape! Summer holidays are kicking off, bringing weeks of family fun and adventures across the UK.
